title: Product Warning Label
text:
## Product Warning

**CAUTION:** This {object} may become {adjective} when exposed to sunlight, gossip, or {adjective} music.

**Do not:**
- {verb} while operating a {vehicle}
- Negotiate with {adjective} people

**Side effects:** {adjective} laughter, sudden urges to {verb}, and believing you can {verb} professionally.

**Keep away from** {adjective} animals and open {plural noun}.

**If swallowed:** Contact a {job} immediately and describe the {adjective} flavor.

**Storage:** Cool, {adjective} place away from children and {adjective} influencers.
